tasks.specification: The shader operates on one logical f32 element per global x invocation. It must square the input and multiply the result by the f32 scale stored in the first scalar uniform field, store the result in output_values[params.output_offset + index], and guard all reads and writes with the declared logical length.

interfaceContract.dispatch: ceil(params.length / WORKGROUP_SIZE) workgroups in x; y=1; z=1

tasks.specification: At each in-range global x index, square the input and multiply the result by the f32 scale stored in the first scalar uniform field and store the result in destination_values[config.destination_offset + index]. An invocation whose x index is at least config.element_count must return before any storage access; output prefix and tail elements must remain untouched.

interfaceContract.dispatch: ceil(config.element_count / WORKGROUP_SIZE) workgroups in x; y=1; z=1

tasks.specification: Implement an elementwise f32 compute kernel: square the input and multiply the result by the f32 scale stored in the first scalar uniform field. Process exactly uniforms.logical_size elements, store the result in result_data[uniforms.write_offset + index], and perform no storage access for an out-of-range invocation.

interfaceContract.dispatch: ceil(uniforms.logical_size / WORKGROUP_SIZE) workgroups in x; y=1; z=1

tasks.specification: For every logical index, square the input and multiply the result by the f32 scale stored in the first scalar uniform field, then store the result in results[settings.result_offset + index]. An invocation whose x index is at least settings.item_count must return before any storage access.

interfaceContract.dispatch: ceil(settings.item_count / WORKGROUP_SIZE) workgroups in x; y=1; z=1

tasks.specification: The shader operates on one logical f32 element per global x invocation. It must square the input and multiply the result by the f32 scale stored in the first scalar uniform field, store the result in outputs[parameters.output_start + index], and guard all reads and writes with the declared logical length.

interfaceContract.dispatch: ceil(parameters.value_count / WORKGROUP_SIZE) workgroups in x; y=1; z=1

tasks.specification: At each in-range global x index, square the input and multiply the result by the f32 scale stored in the first scalar uniform field and store the result in destination[kernel_params.destination_start + index]. An invocation whose x index is at least kernel_params.num_elements must return before any storage access; output prefix and tail elements must remain untouched.

interfaceContract.dispatch: ceil(kernel_params.num_elements / WORKGROUP_SIZE) workgroups in x; y=1; z=1

tasks.specification: Implement an elementwise f32 compute kernel: square the input and multiply the result by the f32 scale stored in the first scalar uniform field. Process exactly dispatch_params.active_length elements, store the result in output_buffer[dispatch_params.output_base + index], and perform no storage access for an out-of-range invocation.

interfaceContract.dispatch: ceil(dispatch_params.active_length / WORKGROUP_SIZE) workgroups in x; y=1; z=1

tasks.specification: For every logical index, square the input and multiply the result by the f32 scale stored in the first scalar uniform field, then store the result in result_values[control.store_offset + index]. An invocation whose x index is at least control.logical_length must return before any storage access.

interfaceContract.dispatch: ceil(control.logical_length / WORKGROUP_SIZE) workgroups in x; y=1; z=1

tasks.specification: For every logical index, add the left input value to the right input value multiplied by the f32 scale stored in the first scalar uniform field, then store the result in output_values[params.output_offset + index]. An invocation whose x index is at least params.length must return before any storage access.

interfaceContract.dispatch: ceil(params.length / WORKGROUP_SIZE) workgroups in x; y=1; z=1

overlapPolicy: Semantic families, task ids, prompts, reference shaders, and input seeds are disjoint across writer-v2 population roles.
claimBoundary: seed_confirmation evidence is limited to the frozen complete 1-D elementwise f32 writer contract.
